candidate_llm_application: LLM token routing in MoE via Voronoi cells: each expert is a generator and tokens are routed to the nearest expert in representation space; the tessellation re-balances on expert addition.

results.title: Moe Expert Routing: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on MoE expert routing, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (MoE expert routing); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (computational-geometry terms vs LLM terms).
